text:
is a preview chapter of the Attack on Titan: Before the Fall manga, written by Ryō Suzukaze and illustrated by . It was included at the end of Volume 1, after Chapter 3.

Overview

 Thirty years after humanity escaped into the safety of the Walls, a Titan makes its appearance within Wall Maria. It goes on a killing spree, eating people left and right. While a pregnant woman, unfazed by the sight of the Titan, stands before it. Though she calls out to it with great respect, she is quickly eaten. 

Summary

As people are going about their everyday lives, they notice a Titan peeking its head through an archway. They stand there in disbelief, confused as to how a Titan can be there if Wall Maria is still intact. Chaos quickly ensues, as the Titan begins casually eating as many people as it can catch. A young boy, afraid and alone, hides in his home hoping the Titan will not find him. He notices it outside his window, and when it breaks through, he screams in terror before being eaten.

On the ground, people run in the opposite direction of the Titan; all except one woman, Elena. Though heavily pregnant, she stands with purpose and calls out to the Titan with complete respect. Slowly grinning; it leans down to her level, unfazed by her words, it quickly eats her. Afterward, it continues on its path of destruction. Due to the lack of technological advancements, humanity is incapable of adequately fighting back.
